  • Method Details

    • setNumThreads

      public static void setNumThreads(int n)

    • getNumThreads

      public static int getNumThreads()
      Current number of threads used by DeepJ.

    • setParallelThreshold

      public static void setParallelThreshold(int n)

    • getParallelThreshold

      public static int getParallelThreshold()
      Current minimum iteration count before DeepJ uses parallel execution.

    • shutdown

      public static void shutdown()
      Clean shutdown (good for CLI apps/tests). Daemon threads already let the JVM exit, but shutdown avoids work continuing after main finishes.

    • forRange

      public static void forRange(int startInclusive, int endExclusive, IntConsumer body)

    • range

      public static DeepJExecutor.Range range(int startInclusive, int endExclusive)
